---
---

<link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css" type="text/css">

<img src="images/scale.png" style="width:25%; border:10px solid; margin-right: 20px" align="left">

This is the website for      
**Ticagrelor compared to clopidogrel in acute coronary syndromes - the TC4 comparative effectiveness study**  

This site will answer some frequently asked questions (FAQ).

A pdf of a presentation explaining the justification and functionning of the trial is available [here](files/ticagrelor.pdf).
